title: A Public Holiday Every Week? Sri Lankans Bemoan the Enforced Day Off.
summary_full: The island’s government, rationing fuel amid shortages from the Iran war, surprised residents by imposing an unusual four-day week.
summary_public: The island’s government, rationing fuel amid shortages from the Iran war, surprised residents by imposing an unusual four-day week.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: rationing fuel amid shortages from the Iran war
